user_query: I'm planning a vacation to Trinidad & Tobago next year and I want to stay updated on the Covid-19 statistics. Can you provide me with the Covid-19 statistics for the year 2022? Also, fetch the most recent Covid-19 statistics for the country. Additionally, I'm interested in news related to the coronavirus. Can you search for news articles on Covid-19?

TaskList.description: Fetch the Covid-19 statistics for Trinidad & Tobago for the year 2022.
Fetch the most recent Covid-19 statistics for Trinidad & Tobago.
Search for news articles related to Covid-19.
